query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.location,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(c.name, ' (', c.roleBucket, ')') END ORDER BY c.name SEPARATOR ' | ') as contactNames
FROM projects p
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
INNER JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.id IN (120006, 120004, 1680006, 1290005, 1740008, 1380025, 1380014, 1350038, 1020016, 840002, 1350012)
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.location
HAVING sendReadyContacts > 0;

  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' AND c.email IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(c.name, ' (', c.roleBucket, ')') END ORDER BY c.name SEPARATOR ' | ') as contactNames
FROM projects p
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
INNER JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.id IN (120006, 120004, 1680006, 1290005, 1740008, 1380025, 1380014, 1350038, 1020016, 840002, 1350012)

HAVING sendReadyContacts > 0;
